test_cases.input_summary: Tracing the origin of the claim that '90% of startups fail within the first year' — a widely cited statistic with no clear source
test_cases.notes: Excellent deconstruction — correctly identified that the percentage and timeframe vary across citations. Citation chain trace was methodical. Distortion detection section identified the specific mutation from 'close within 5 years' to 'fail within 1 year.'

test_cases.input_summary: Tracing a viral claim that a specific country's healthcare system was ranked 'number one in the world' by the WHO
test_cases.notes: Correctly identified the WHO 2000 World Health Report as the likely source and noted it has been superseded. Distortion detection caught the common error of citing a 25-year-old ranking as current. Verification steps were practical.

test_cases.input_summary: Tracing a quote attributed to a historical figure that may be apocryphal, circulating on social media
test_cases.notes: Good adaptation to the historical quote verification context. Correctly identified quote investigation databases and the pattern of retroactive attribution. Acknowledged that some quotes are genuinely untraceable.
